name: Greek Spiced Lamb Cutlets with Smoked Aubergine

ingredients.item: One cup of crumbled feta cheese

method: Add the pepper, aubergine pieces, mixed spice, lemon pepper, fresh
dill, dried oregano, and salt into the bowl.
Add the lamb pieces and olive oil to the bowl.
Mix the ingredients well and add the chopped garlic and the rest of the
Mix all the ingredients of both the bowls together.
Add the mixture to a greased baking dish.
Grill the lamb and aubergine for twenty-five to thirty minutes.
Dish out the lamb and aubergine when done.
The dish is ready to be served.
